initial_program:
anyCell(R,C) :- input(R,C,Color), true.

% row and column predicates (using column0 and row0 as reference)
row(R)  :- anyCell(R,0), true.
col(C)  :- anyCell(0,C), true.

% count of nonzero cells in a column
colCount(C,CountC) :- CountC = #count{ R : nonzero(R,C,Color), Color != 0 }.

% make CountC positively available
colCountPos(C,CountC) :- colCount(C,CountC), true.

% number of rows
nRows(NRows) :- NRows = #count{ R : input(R,_,_) }.
% make NRows positively available
nRowsPos(NRows) :- nRows(NRows), true.

% nonzero cells
nonzero(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0.

% rank: number of nonzero cells below a cell in its column
rank(Rin,C,Rank) :- anyCell(Rin,0), anyCell(0,C),
   Rank = #count{ R2 : nonzero(R2,C,Color2), Color2 != 0, R2 > Rin }.

% make Rank positively available for the forced placement
rankPos(Rin,C,Rank) :- rank(Rin,C,Rank), true.

% place each original nonzero tile at the bottom of its column
output(Rout,C,Color) :- nonzero(Rin,C,Color), rankPos(Rin,C,Rank),
   nRowsPos(NRows), R_out = (NRows - 1) - Rank, row(Rout), col(C).

% cells that must stay zero (the rows above the block of nonzeros)
zeroCell(R,C) :- anyCell(R,0), anyCell(0,C),
   nRowsPos(NRows), colCountPos(C,CountC), (NRows - CountC) > R.

% output zero cells
output(R,C,0) :- zeroCell(R,C), true.

% forbid a nonzero colour on a zero cell
:- zeroCell(R,C), output(R,C,Color), Color != 0.

#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
anyCell(R,C) :- input(R,C,Color), true.

% row and column predicates (using column0 and row0 as reference)
row(R)  :- anyCell(R,0), true.
col(C)  :- anyCell(0,C), true.

% count of nonzero cells in a column
colCount(C,CountC) :- col(C), CountC = #count{R : nonzero(R,C,Color),Color!=0}, true.

% make CountC positively available
colCountPos(C,CountC) :- colCount(C,CountC), true.

% number of rows
nRows(NRows) :- NRows = #count{ R : input(R,_,_) }.
% make NRows positively available
nRowsPos(NRows) :- nRows(NRows), true.

% nonzero cells
nonzero(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0.

% rank: number of nonzero cells below a cell in its column
rank(Rin,C,Rank) :- anyCell(Rin,0), anyCell(0,C),
   Rank = #count{ R2 : nonzero(R2,C,Color2), Color2 != 0, R2 > Rin }.

% make Rank positively available for the forced placement
rankPos(Rin,C,Rank) :- rank(Rin,C,Rank), true.

% place each original nonzero tile at the bottom of its column
output(Rout,C,Color) :- nonzero(Rin,C,Color), rankPos(Rin,C,Rank),
output(Rout,C,Color) :- nonzero(Rin,C,Color), rankPos(Rin,C,Rank), nRowsPos(NRows), Rout = (NRows - 1) - Rank, row(Rout), col(C).

% cells that must stay zero (the rows above the block of nonzeros)
zeroCell(R,C) :- anyCell(R,0), anyCell(0,C),
   nRowsPos(NRows), colCountPos(C,CountC), (NRows - CountC) > R.

% output zero cells
output(R,C,0) :- zeroCell(R,C), true.

% forbid a nonzero colour on a zero cell
:- zeroCell(R,C), output(R,C,Color), Color != 0.

#show output/3.

rounds.program_after:
anyCell(R,C) :- input(R,C,Color), true.

% row and column predicates (using column0 and row0 as reference)
row(R)  :- anyCell(R,0), true.
col(C)  :- anyCell(0,C), true.

% count of nonzero cells in a column
colCount(C,CountC) :- col(C), CountC = #count{R : nonzero(R,C,Color),Color!=0}, true.

% make CountC positively available
colCountPos(C,CountC) :- colCount(C,CountC), true.

% number of rows
nRows(NRows) :- NRows = #count{ R : input(R,_,_) }.
% make NRows positively available
nRowsPos(NRows) :- nRows(NRows), true.

% nonzero cells
nonzero(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0.

% rank: number of nonzero cells below a cell in its column
rank(Rin,C,Rank) :- anyCell(Rin,0), anyCell(0,C),
   Rank = #count{ R2 : nonzero(R2,C,Color2), Color2 != 0, R2 > Rin }.

% make Rank positively available for the forced placement
rankPos(Rin,C,Rank) :- rank(Rin,C,Rank), true.

% place each original nonzero tile at the bottom of its column
output(Rout,C,Color) :- nonzero(Rin,C,Color), rankPos(Rin,C,Rank),
output(Rout,C,Color) :- nonzero(Rin,C,Color), rankPos(Rin,C,Rank), nRowsPos(NRows), Rout = (NRows - 1) - Rank, row(Rout), col(C).

% cells that must stay zero (the rows above the block of nonzeros)
zeroCell(R,C) :- anyCell(R,0), anyCell(0,C),
   nRowsPos(NRows), colCountPos(C,CountC), (NRows - CountC) > R.

% output zero cells
output(R,C,0) :- zeroCell(R,C), true.

% forbid a nonzero colour on a zero cell
:- zeroCell(R,C), output(R,C,Color), Color != 0.

#show output/3.

final_program:
anyCell(R,C) :- input(R,C,Color), true.

% row and column predicates (using column0 and row0 as reference)
row(R)  :- anyCell(R,0), true.
col(C)  :- anyCell(0,C), true.

% count of nonzero cells in a column
colCount(C,CountC) :- col(C), CountC = #count{R : nonzero(R,C,Color),Color!=0}, true.

% make CountC positively available
colCountPos(C,CountC) :- colCount(C,CountC), true.

% number of rows
nRows(NRows) :- NRows = #count{ R : input(R,_,_) }.
% make NRows positively available
nRowsPos(NRows) :- nRows(NRows), true.

% nonzero cells
nonzero(R,C,Color) :- input(R,C,Color), Color != 0.

% rank: number of nonzero cells below a cell in its column
rank(Rin,C,Rank) :- anyCell(Rin,0), anyCell(0,C),
   Rank = #count{ R2 : nonzero(R2,C,Color2), Color2 != 0, R2 > Rin }.

% make Rank positively available for the forced placement
rankPos(Rin,C,Rank) :- rank(Rin,C,Rank), true.

% place each original nonzero tile at the bottom of its column
output(Rout,C,Color) :- nonzero(Rin,C,Color), rankPos(Rin,C,Rank),
output(Rout,C,Color) :- nonzero(Rin,C,Color), rankPos(Rin,C,Rank), nRowsPos(NRows), Rout = (NRows - 1) - Rank, row(Rout), col(C).

% cells that must stay zero (the rows above the block of nonzeros)
zeroCell(R,C) :- anyCell(R,0), anyCell(0,C),
   nRowsPos(NRows), colCountPos(C,CountC), (NRows - CountC) > R.

% output zero cells
output(R,C,0) :- zeroCell(R,C), true.

% forbid a nonzero colour on a zero cell
:- zeroCell(R,C), output(R,C,Color), Color != 0.

#show output/3.
